message:
fix(extensions): effective_timeout overflow fix + budget enforcement + OAuth registration tests

Three categories of changes:

1. Bug fix in effective_timeout(): replace
   deadline.saturating_duration_since(wall_now()) with explicit millis
   subtraction to avoid potential panic/overflow when the deadline type
   doesn't support saturating_duration_since on Instant

2. Budget enforcement: insert effective_timeout() calls in tool-call and
   context-payload paths so operation timeouts are capped by any active
   budget deadline

3. New tests:
   - register_provider_oauth_config_extracted: full OAuth config roundtrip
   - register_provider_without_oauth_config_has_none: confirms None
   - register_provider_oauth_missing_required_fields_ignored: missing
     clientId yields None
   - register_provider_oauth_no_redirect_uri: works without redirectUri
   - effective_timeout_no_budget_returns_operation_timeout
   - effective_timeout_with_tight_budget_caps_timeout
   - effective_timeout_with_expired_budget_returns_zero
   - effective_timeout_takes_min_of_budget_and_operation

Also fixes budget test duration arithmetic to avoid Instant subtraction
issues and updates oneshot import path.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
